title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at Muthoot Finance

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at Muthoot Finance
jsonLd.description:
Muthoot Finance is actively seeking a talented and motivated Financial Analyst to join our dynamic team in Patna. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Muthoot Finance:
Muthoot Finance is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Risk Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Life and accident insurance
• Referral bonus program
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Muthoot Finance!
